title: Nether+
description: Adds two new biomes to the nether
body:
# Nether Additions

## Future Additions
This mod will add many new features, including new mobs, mechanics, blocks, items, bosses, biomes, and more! We aim to make the nether feel as new and alive as switching from 1.15 to 1.16.

## Current Additions
- Adds Saffron and Charred Wood types, accessible through commands
